_comment: Map controller inputs to Mac keyboard keys. Valid key names: A-Z, Num0-Num9, Space, Enter, Escape, Tab, LeftShift, LeftControl, LeftAlt, LeftCmd, Up, Down, Left, Right, F1-F12, Comma, Period, Slash, Semicolon, Quote, Backslash, Minus, Equal, Grave, Backspace

leftStick._comment: Analog stick converted to 8-way digital keys

rightStick._comment: mode 'mouse' = camera look via mouse movement. mode 'keys' = arrow keys

touchpad._comment: PS5-style touchpad: drag moves the mouse, tap = left click, two-finger tap = right click, two-finger drag = scroll

gyro._comment: Gyro aiming (toggle on the phone in settings). Accumulated tilt degrees -> mouse pixels
